name: Sports Drink

pros.title: has a narrow but legitimate sports use case
pros.explanation: The category should recognise context when a use case is actually real.

pros.title: context tells the real story
pros.explanation: That is the whole point of misc.

pros.title: clear real-world role
pros.explanation: If a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot.

cons.title: terrible as a casual everyday drink
cons.explanation: Outside hard training, the sugar is hard to justify.

cons.title: easy to overrate or misuse
cons.explanation: This category attracts strong marketing and habits.

cons.title: rarely deserves to be treated as a foundation food
cons.explanation: Most of these are situational, not core nutrition plays.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
